classification.reasoning: The patch involves deep structural changes to the version compatibility and handshake logic in the transport layer of the system. It modifies the Version class to compute minimum compatibility versions dynamically, changes handshake request and response handling to include minimum compatibility versions, and updates multiple classes (InboundDecoder, OutboundHandler, TcpTransport, TcpTransportChannel, TransportHandshaker) to support this new handshake protocol. The changes affect core transport communication and version compatibility checks, indicating significant API divergence and refactoring rather than simple string replacements or formatting changes. The patch also includes extensive test updates to verify the new compatibility logic. Given the scope and depth of these changes, the patch is classified as TYPE_IV (deep structural refactoring) with high confidence. The token budget estimate is high due to the complexity and number of files involved.
